---
title: "Tx_Cluster"
author: "Dipankor Dhrubo"
date: "2025-12-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(umap)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(factoextra)
library(scales)
library(proxy)
library(patchwork)
library(forcats)
```


```{r}
NSCLC_metadata <- read_rds("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/NSCLC_metadata.rds") %>% select(-Race)
Normalized_timeline <- read_csv("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Function_files/Normalized_timeline.csv")


tx_cluster_surv <-function(
  NSCLC_metadata,
  timeline_long_norm,
  # join + survival columns
  sample_col = "sample",
  time_col   = "TimeSinceTreatmentStart",
  tx_col     = "treatment_group",
  surv_time_col = "diagsurvtime",
  status_col    = "status",
  meta_keep = c("Normalize_Candida", "CAlevel"),

  # horizon / binning
  horizon_years = 5,
  include_none  = TRUE,     # fill NA as "None" before encoding
  drop_none_cols = TRUE,    # drop features ending in "_None"

  # PCA / UMAP / clustering
  seed = 42,
  n_pcs = 50,
  umap_neighbors = 30,
  umap_min_dist  = 0.3,
  k_range = 3:20,
  kmeans_nstart = 50
){
  suppressPackageStartupMessages({
    library(dplyr)
    library(tidyr)
    library(stringr)
    library(tibble)
  })

  # ---- 0) Basic checks ----
  stopifnot(all(c(sample_col, time_col, tx_col) %in% names(timeline_long_norm)))
  stopifnot(sample_col %in% names(NSCLC_metadata))
  stopifnot(all(c(surv_time_col, status_col) %in% names(NSCLC_metadata)))

  # ---- 1) Month bin matrix (Month_000, Month_001, ...) ----
  # round to month index exactly like your code
  dat <- timeline_long_norm %>%
    transmute(
      sample = .data[[sample_col]],
      TimeSinceTreatmentStart = as.numeric(.data[[time_col]]),
      treatment_group = as.character(.data[[tx_col]])
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(sample), !is.na(TimeSinceTreatmentStart), !is.na(treatment_group)) %>%
    mutate(
      month_idx = round(TimeSinceTreatmentStart * 12),
      TimeBin = sprintf("Month_%03d", month_idx)
    ) %>%
    filter(month_idx >= 0, month_idx <= horizon_years * 12)

  treatment_matrix <- dat %>%
    group_by(sample, TimeBin) %>%
    summarise(
      Treatment = paste(sort(unique(treatment_group)), collapse = "+"),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from  = TimeBin,
      values_from = Treatment,
      values_fill = NA
    )

  # order month columns numerically
  month_cols <- setdiff(names(treatment_matrix), "sample")
  month_numbers <- as.numeric(str_extract(month_cols, "\\d+"))
  ordered_months <- month_cols[order(month_numbers)]
  treatment_matrix_ordered <- treatment_matrix[, c("sample", ordered_months), drop = FALSE]

  # ---- 2) Limit to horizon months: 0..(horizon_years*12) inclusive (65 cols when 5y) ----
  n_months <- horizon_years * 12
  keep_months <- sprintf("Month_%03d", 0:n_months)
  keep_cols <- intersect(keep_months, names(treatment_matrix_ordered))
  treatment_short <- treatment_matrix_ordered %>%
    select(sample, all_of(keep_cols)) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = -sample, names_to = "Month", values_to = "Treatment")

  if (include_none) {
    treatment_short <- treatment_short %>%
      mutate(Treatment = replace_na(Treatment, "None"))
  }

  # ---- 3) One-hot encode Month_Treatment ----
  treatment_encoded <- treatment_short %>%
    mutate(
      Feature = paste(Month, Treatment, sep = "_"),
      Value = 1L
    ) %>%
    select(sample, Feature, Value) %>%
    distinct() %>%  # avoid duplicate 1s
    pivot_wider(names_from = Feature, values_from = Value, values_fill = list(Value = 0L))

  if (drop_none_cols) {
    none_cols <- grep("_None$", names(treatment_encoded), value = TRUE)
    treatment_encoded <- treatment_encoded %>% select(-all_of(none_cols))
  }

  # matrix for PCA/UMAP
  X <- treatment_encoded %>%
    column_to_rownames("sample") %>%
    as.matrix()

  sl_ids <- rownames(X)
  if (length(sl_ids) < 3) stop("Too few samples after encoding to cluster.")

  # ---- 4) PCA ----
  set.seed(seed)
  pca_result <- prcomp(X, scale. = TRUE)
  n_take <- min(n_pcs, ncol(pca_result$x))
  pca_matrix <- pca_result$x[, 1:n_take, drop = FALSE]
  rownames(pca_matrix) <- sl_ids

  # ---- 5) UMAP ----
  if (!requireNamespace("umap", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'umap' not installed. Install with install.packages('umap').")
  }
  set.seed(seed)
  umap_result <- umap::umap(pca_matrix, n_neighbors = umap_neighbors, min_dist = umap_min_dist)

  umap_df <- as.data.frame(umap_result$layout)
  colnames(umap_df) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")
  umap_df$sample <- sl_ids

  # ---- 6) kmeans for k_range ----
  cluster_results <- data.frame(sample = sl_ids, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  for (k in k_range) {
    set.seed(seed)
    km <- kmeans(umap_df[, c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")], centers = k, nstart = kmeans_nstart)
    cluster_results[[paste0("Cluster_k", k)]] <- km$cluster
  }

  # ---- 7) Merge with survival/meta ----
  keep_meta <- intersect(meta_keep, names(NSCLC_metadata))
  Surv_data <- NSCLC_metadata %>%
    filter(.data[[sample_col]] %in% cluster_results$sample) %>%
    select(
      sample = all_of(sample_col),
      diagsurvtime = all_of(surv_time_col),
      status = all_of(status_col),
      all_of(keep_meta)
    )

  Cluster_surv <- cluster_results %>%
    left_join(Surv_data, by = "sample") %>%
    drop_na() %>%
    distinct()

  list(
    Cluster_surv = Cluster_surv,
    cluster_results = cluster_results,
    umap_df = umap_df,
    X = X,
    treatment_matrix_ordered = treatment_matrix_ordered,
    treatment_encoded = treatment_encoded
  )
}


res_clust <- tx_cluster_surv(
  NSCLC_metadata = NSCLC_metadata,
  timeline_long_norm = Normalized_timeline,
  horizon_years = 5
)

Cluster_surv <- res_clust$Cluster_surv

write_csv(Cluster_surv,"/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Function_files/Cluster_survival_NSCLC.csv")

```
